title: University of Tennessee Research Foundation sues Anthropic over neural-network patents
watch: Whether independent (non-Reuters-derived) reporting or a docket/case-number record surfaces
Any Anthropic response beyond the initial denial (motion to dismiss, answer, settlement)

cycle_2026-07-22_night_c2_note: New standalone story, surfaced via Techmeme (Reuters wire), dedup-check clean. Legal/litigation claim type -- verified via parallel fresh verifier + adversarial falsifier sub-agents. Confirmed wire-exclusive (all outlets relay one Reuters story, byline Blake Brittain); no docket indexed yet. Falsifier's key addition: Anthropic's on-record denial ('We disagree with the allegations and intend to defend this case vigorously'), missing from the initial triage summary, added to the article. All claims labeled single-source per the wire-exclusive rule; every allegation attributed to UTRF's complaint, no court ruling implied. Style gates run on both languages: pass.
